label: 477_annual hicp_hicp inflation_hicp_m3
description: The European Central Bank provided detailed forecasts of inflation and economic growth, emphasizing the role of monetary policy in supporting recovery. ECB President Mario Draghi outlined the bank's strategy to maintain low interest rates until inflation expectations aligned with its target.
